holdings.infoBox: CEFA is an equity ETF with a total of 370 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.98%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 1.72%, HSBC Holdings at 1.70%, EssilorLuxottica Société anonyme at 1.57%, and HOYA Corporation at 1.43%.

overview.description: The Global X S&P Catholic Values Developed ex-US ETF (CEFA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of large-cap stocks from Developed ex-US markets. The cap-weighted index screens out firms inconsistent with Catholic values. CEFA was launched on Jun 22, 2020 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: S&P Developed Ex-U.S. Catholic Values Index
